strategy: Enter on time. A wizard who joins after Round 1 takes a 90% max-Health hit and eats a refreshed Doom and Gloom.
Plan to out-damage, not out-heal. On Round 1 he casts Doom and Gloom and strips 50% of everyone's max Health, so healing is weak and your effective Health is low.
Keep the fight short. Every third Round he removes another 5% max Health and casts Mass Infection, which stacks against you over time.
He has only 5,000 Health and resists every school just 15%, so blade once and hit with your strongest school.
Clear the two Gator minions with an AoE so they do not add pressure while you burst the boss.
cheatNotes: If you join after Round 1 you take a 90% max-Health hit and he refreshes Doom and Gloom on you, so enter on time.
On Round 1 he casts Doom and Gloom and a Moon spell that strips 50% of everyone's max Health, cutting both your effective Health and your healing early.
Every third Round he removes another 5% max Health and casts Mass Infection, so burst him down before this stacks.
